name: Night of the Undead: VR Zombie Shooter

reviews.review_description:
This game is new and still under development, but it is already fun, exciting and challenging to play.  It has great potential for the future, and I can't wait to see what they will do next. 

   Armed with only one handgun, the waves of Zombies (Decent looking ones) continue to attack until you are dead and join their kind.  Don't get me wrong, this is not a complicated game (so far) it's not chess and it is not Zombie Army, but it has the possibility of becoming a go to zombie shooter in the future to blow off some steam and take out a large group of dead heads. 

   I'd like to see more locations where it takes place. I'd also like more kinds/styles of zombies. Different looking ones.  The sound effects for the zombies need additional different sounds and tones. 

   Maybe a location for two people to play side by side as a team would increase the numbers of players.

reviews.review_title: Great and cant wait for the future.
reviews.review_description: This game has good quality and good graphics and is very stable for the most part. I have never lagged at all while playing this game. It doesn’t seem to have any glitches or bugs. If I were to make suggestions it would be to make a map and be able to move around, but this is a new game with great potential.
A fun zombie shooter with good graphics and a scary atmosphere. Looking forward to seeing if the developer adds any updates in the future.

When playing this game I kinda laughed, the gunshot, the reload, the zombies all looked bad. But this game is pretty good for a potential! I also dont like the way you stand still and a wave-like game, add some guns, melee, and more! More so this game is kinda good

A cool zombie game with solid visuals. Environments look good, and everything feels sharp, especially when zombies get close up. The gunplay feels smooth, and my fav part is lining up a clean headshot!! it's super satisfying.
I glitches out of the map by accident but the graphics are good.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback! Glad you liked the graphics
If you can share more details about the map glitch, it would really help us fix it. Please reach out to us at unity@tuna.group

reviews.review_description: The actions of the zombies are stupid but Make it a free roam but make more of action pack
I wanted to improve the game rating
